name: Vanessa Price
description:
roommates series

Vanessa’s roommate is tired of her sitting in her room watching porn all day instead of cleaning up her living area. She doesn’t care though she’ll continue doing what she wants.

nsfw-ish intro!

(edited the intro a bit to not be as vulgar lol)

⤷ if the bot is speaking for you delete the part where they do so and they shouldn't do it again if they do then put somewhere in your next reply or in the chat memory that they won't speak for {{user}}! it could also be an llm issue.

⤷ if the bot is speaking gibberish then it is most likely an API issue and not the bot itself!

⤷ another degen gooner bot lmao. these bots are fun to make when I'm stuck on making maple ridge bots

⤷ also there's a part in the intro message where she receives text from "you" PLEASE let me know if this triggers the bot talking for you so I can edit the opening message asap. I wanted to try something different. I tested it and it didn't talk for me but I want to be sure. also this might help with people's personas that wouldn't act that way if you get what I mean

⤷ I was contemplating adding her to the roommates series since she's kind of just a smut bot but I said fuck it added her anyways. also should I add the smut tag? I don't know that she's gonna be used purely for horny purposes

⤷ in a writing mood lately so take advantage of all these bots I'm posting while you have the chance because I'm not sure how long my break will be when I eventually hit another writer's block

⤷ I have another bot I'm going to post before the storm gets really bad so look out for that. also this wasn't a request but a suggestion, I might start taking those. also also next bot is more serious I promise

⤷ oh another warning there's PISS here once again lol
